## Summary

- What changed?
- Why did it change?
- Any impact on users/research outputs?

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Security

## Security and Privacy Checklist (required)

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/security_audit.py --no-history` and got PASS.
- [ ] No secrets/tokens/credentials were added to tracked files.
- [ ] No private keys or sensitive config values were added.
- [ ] No personal data (PII) was introduced unintentionally.
- [ ] Public metadata was reviewed (`.github/CODEOWNERS`, `.github/FUNDING.yml`, `CITATION.cff`).
- [ ] New dependencies are justified and pinned appropriately when possible.
- [ ] If auth/API integrations changed, docs and safe defaults were updated.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests were run locally (`pytest`).
- [ ] Linters/formatters were run if applicable.
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (CLI/output format/docs).

## Release Readiness (for version/release PRs)

- [ ] Changelog updated.
- [ ] Version bumped consistently.
- [ ] SECURITY.md/README checked for stale references.
- [ ] Optional deep scan done: `python scripts/security_audit.py --history-commits 200`.

## Related

- Issue(s):
- Notes for reviewer:
